name: RZVDDEL
definition:
CREATE TRIGGER [dbo].[RZVDDEL] ON [dbo].[SIPARISFISLERI]
FOR DELETE
AS
SET NOCOUNT ON

DECLARE @DEL_SB_REF AS INT
DECLARE @DEL_RZV AS SMALLINT

DECLARE @SIPRZVKUL AS INT
SELECT @SIPRZVKUL=SIPRZVKUL FROM GENELTANIMLAR WITH(NOLOCK)
IF ISNULL(@SIPRZVKUL,0)>0 
BEGIN
	DECLARE cur CURSOR LOCAL FOR  
	select RZV,SB_REF from DELETED
	OPEN cur;  
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur 
	INTO @DEL_RZV,@DEL_SB_REF;
	WHILE @@FETCH_STATUS = 0  
	BEGIN
		IF(ISNULL(@DEL_RZV,0)>0)
		BEGIN
			EXEC dbo.REZERVEIPTALSB @DEL_SB_REF,0
		END
	FETCH NEXT FROM cur
	INTO @DEL_RZV,@DEL_SB_REF;
	END  
	CLOSE cur;  
	DEALLOCATE cur;
END
